languages.original_text: "Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."

languages.text: "Золото и кровь... Обычно роскошь не вызывает у меня столь смешанные эмоции".
languages.translation_comment: characters entered the medbay for the first time

languages.text: "Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."
languages.original_text: "Золото и кровь... Обычно роскошь не вызывает у меня столь смешанные эмоции".

traits.locale_text: "Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."
"Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."
"Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."

languages.text: 「金と血…贅沢は、私をこんな複雑な感情にさせることは稀だ」
languages.original_text: "Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."

traits.locale_text: 「金と血…贅沢は、私をこんな複雑な感情にさせることは稀だ。」

languages.text: « De l'or et du sang... D'habitude, le luxe ne me fait pas ressentir des émotions aussi contradictoires. »
languages.original_text: "Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."

traits.locale_text: « De l'or et du sang... D'habitude, le luxe ne me fait pas ressentir des émotions aussi contradictoires. »

languages.text: "Gold und Blut ... Luxus weckt für gewöhnlich keine so gemischten Gefühle in mir."
languages.original_text: "Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."

traits.locale_text: "Gold und Blut ... Luxus weckt für gewöhnlich keine so gemischten Gefühle in mir."

languages.text: "Altın ve kan... Lüks, bende genellikle bu kadar karmaşık duygular uyandırmaz."
languages.original_text: "Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."

traits.locale_text: "Altın ve kan... Lüks, bende genellikle bu kadar karmaşık duygular uyandırmaz."

languages.text: «Oro y sangre... Los lujos no suelen evocar emociones tan ambiguas en mí».
languages.original_text: "Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."

traits.locale_text: «Oro y sangre... Los lujos no suelen evocar emociones tan ambiguas en mí».

languages.text: “黄金与鲜血……奢靡之物通常不会在我心中激起这么复杂的情绪。”
languages.original_text: "Gold and blood... Luxury doesn't usually stir up such mixed emotions in me."

traits.locale_text: “黄金与鲜血……奢靡之物通常不会在我心中激起这么复杂的情绪。”
